source.section: 3 - AN/AAQ-28(V) LITENING II Targeting Pod > 3.5 - Pointing Methods > 3.5.2 - VVSLV (Velocity Vector Slaved)

steps.action: Select FLIR page and press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the selected DDI.
steps.voiced: Select the FLIR page and press Sensor Control Switch toward that DDI.

steps.action: The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
steps.voiced: Confirm the Select Focus Diamond is on the FLIR display.

steps.action: Select VVSLV by either: Selecting the VVSLV pushbutton on the FLIR page, or; Pressing the Undesignate button twice within one second.
steps.voiced: Select VVSLV via the VVSLV pushbutton on the FLIR page, or press Undesignate twice within one second.

steps.action: Press OSB next to RTCL (boxed) to display the targeting pod's reticle
steps.voiced: Press OSB next to RTCL to display the pod reticle.

steps.action: To designate a target, fly the aircraft to set the velocity vector on the target, then use the TDC DEPRESS control (“ENTER”). A diamond will appear over the designated point on the FLIR page.
steps.voiced: Fly the velocity vector onto the target, then press TDC DEPRESS to designate.
